name: RuleTester: --reporter tap emits TAP-formatted output (1..N, ok/not ok lines)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/rule-tester.sh" --rule-file "$PWD/rules/no-eval.js" --tests "$PWD/tests/no-eval.test.json" --reporter tap 2>out.tap && grep -E '^(1\.\.|ok |not ok )' out.tap 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
